servinfo.title: Front Seat Belt Assembly Removal and Installation

attention1.ptxt: Never attempt to disassemble or repair the seat belt pretensioner. If any abnormality is found, be sure to replace it with new one as an assembly.

Be sure to read Precautions for Service and Diagnosis of Seat Belt before starting to work and observe every precaution during work. Neglecting them may result in personal injury or inactivation of the seat belt pretensioner when necessary.

attention3.ptxt: Refer to Repair and Inspection Required after Accident before replacing an activated pretensioner.

s1.ptxt: Disconnect connector (1) from seat belt pretensioner (2) as shown in figure.
Remove screw and bolts of front seat belt assembly.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure, noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Check that pins (3) on body are inserted in long holes (2) on seat belt pretensioner (1).
Tighten bolts and screw of front seat belt assembly in the numerical order to specified torque.
Connect connector (2) to seat belt pretensioner (1) as follows.
Connect connector (2) to seat belt pretensioner with lock (3) released.
Press lock (3) to lock connector securely.
